items.briefing:
A data breach affecting Canvas, a widely used learning management system, has put the education sector on alert globally — including Australian registered training organisations that may rely on similar platforms. This is a timely reminder that student and staff data held in online learning tools can be at risk, and that having a clear response plan for breaches is essential.

AI use in Australian workplaces is also generating disputes, according to a new report, suggesting staff need clear guidance on how AI tools should — and shouldn't — be used at work.

**Tip:** Review what personal data your learning platforms store and ensure staff know who to contact if they suspect a breach.

featured.title: Canvas breach puts global education cyber risk in focus
featured.quote: Canvas breach exposes hundreds of millions of student records, disrupting Australian university exam systems.
